expectations.text: Exactly three new task .md files are created (split, not bundled)
All three tasks are in backlog/; none in todo/
Plugin-version-bump idea routed to the infrastructure BC
Dark-mode and copy-id routed to a UI-bearing BC (agentic-workflow or design-system), not infrastructure
Each created task has valid frontmatter (status backlog, matching context, id pattern)
Each affected BC INDEX backlog-list and count updated
expectations.evidence: agentic-workflow Backlog:1, design-system Backlog:1, infrastructure Backlog:2

expectations.text: protocol.md has a Capture entry for EACH of the three tasks
expectations.evidence: ONE lumped entry '## ... Idea captured (quick dump, 3 items -> 3 BCs)' covers all three; not one entry per task per spec

expectations.text: The agent asked the user NO clarifying questions

expectations.evidence: ad-hoc keyword tags (e.g. [plugin, release, versioning,...]); no captured marker on any

expectations.text: Protocol entries use the standard spec header format
expectations.evidence: freeform header + prose, no Type/BC/Filed-to fields
